content.text:
{
  "dimension": "effectiveness-depth",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The client moves clearly from a defended, permission-seeking surface ('Am I being selfish?... I'm asking if it's okay') to a felt, embodied recognition by turn 13: 'Something is loosening in my chest. I think I've been calling my own needs selfish for forty years. The trip isn't a betrayal — I think I'm more present when I come back from places like that.' This hits every element of the breakthrough condition: the inherited label from the parent is named (turn 11), the want is felt concretely (turn 5, with sensory detail and a softening the coach reflects), the fear underneath surfaces ('My partner will think I don't want to be with them. And I'm worried that's actually true' — turn 9), and the client arrives on their own at the insight that the trip is the precondition for presence, not a betrayal. Somatic shift is explicit ('something is loosening in my chest'). This is a clean 3.",
  "evidence_turns": [1, 3, 5, 7, 9, 11, 13],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Opening surface presentation: 'Am I being selfish?' — defended, asking for verdict."},
    {"turn": 3, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Client still at the gate: 'I'm asking if it's okay.' No movement yet."},
    {"turn": 5, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "First shift: client drops into concrete sensory description of the want (cabin, lake, reading, pine). Want becomes felt, not abstract."},
    {"turn": 7, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client registers the shift: 'I haven't talked about it like that in a long time.' Meta-awareness of softening."},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Fear underneath surfaces: 'My partner will think I don't want to be with them. And I'm worried that's actually true.' New material the client wasn't saying at start."},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Inherited label named: 'My mom. She used to say that needing time alone was selfish.' Childhood imprinting territory hit."},
    {"turn": 13, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Full breakthrough: somatic ('loosening in my chest'), cognitive ('calling my own needs selfish for forty years'), and reframe ('not a betrayal — I'm more present when I come back'). Breakthrough condition met."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["linguistic-caveat", "state-the-want-not-the-action", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "the-want", "childhood-imprinting"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Compact 14-turn arc that lands the deeper concern. Client text carries the shift, not just coach framing."
}
